MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Christiansen Family Partnership is present. Represented by Ron Rodiness.
Attorney, Daniel Stern, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Darryl Scopes, is present.
Attorney, C. J. Kingsley , representing the defendant through limited scope.
Judge Ulmer, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 218 , for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-23-2010 is vacated.
